name: word-unscrambler
description: A word unscrambler app built with React, TypeScript, and Express

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/client && npm run build:check-size
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/client && npm run test -w packages/server
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w packages/client && npm run test:coverage -w packages/server
scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run test:e2e
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/client && npm run lint -w packages/server
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint -w packages/client -- --fix && npm run lint -w packages/server -- --fix
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w packages/client && npm run type-check -w packages/server

author: Chris Clark
